highRiskItems.reason: Codex high-risk createNewQuestion: Source image visibly indicates open trunk and French option B says trunk open. Existing q0602/q0606/q0617 candidates have image-answer conflicts for trunk/hood/doors, so do not approve an existing qid; create a new item with key B.

rejectedTopMatcherExamples.reason: Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Image: rainy follow-ahead vehicle. Source option C = 'ne pas utiliser les feux de route' (do not use main beams) — matches q0497 correct 'cannot use the high beam light' when following another vehicle in rain.

Codex medium-risk approveExistingQid: Source states you may force an oncoming vehicle to reverse — this is false. q0018 explicitly conveys that forcing the other vehicle is incorrect (Wrong). Rejected top matcher: Top machine candidate was q0075 (U-turn guidance) which does not match this prompt; q0018 in the candidate list better matches the source semantics.

Codex medium-risk approveExistingQid: Image shows a mandatory sign with straight and left arrows (allowed straight or left). q0717 maps to 'going straight and left turn' (source option B). Top machine match q0683 conflicted (prohibition wording), so selected q0717. Rejected top matcher: Top candidate q0683 indicated a prohibition ('no going straight and no left turn'), which conflicts with the pictured mandatory blue sign; q0717 better matches the pictured allowed directions.

Codex medium-risk keepUnresolved: Image shows an intersection with lights/crosswalk; source asks if right turn is permitted but visual semantics (signal aspect, signage, pedestrians) are ambiguous. Top machine candidate (q0194) is about speeding through an intersection and is not a semantic match. Rejected top matcher: Top matcher q0194 prompt ('may speed up to go through the intersection') is unrelated to the source question about turning right.

Codex medium-risk approveExistingQid: Source: 'When the position light is turned on, this indicator lights up.' q0555 explicitly: 'It lights when turning on the sidelights (parking lights)' — matches meaning. French 'Yes' = A. Note: top machine candidate q0528 (high beam) conflicts with this candidate. Rejected top matcher: Top matcher q0528 refers to high-beam indicator (conflicts with position/sidelight meaning).

Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Source statement forbids overtaking in tunnels and on steep slopes. q0209 explicitly states overtaking is not allowed in tunnels, steep slopes, or similar sections. Statement is true → French 'Yes' (A).

Codex medium-risk approveExistingQid: Manual qbank search finds q0833, the double white broken lines before an intersection meaning slowdown-and-yield line. Source option C is 'slow down and give way to other vehicles'.

Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Manual qbank search finds q0532, exactly: sudden braking while turning with ABS can skid. Source statement is true; local answer A (Yes). Rejected top q0064 as only broadly icy-road related.

Codex medium-risk approveExistingQid: Bicycle road marking corresponds to q0863, the lane for non-vehicles. French option B ('voie réservée aux véhicules non motorisés') is the closest official meaning.

Codex medium-risk approveExistingQid: Source asks max permitted speed on highway when visibility <100 m. Top candidate q0411 has prompt matching this exactly and gives 'less than 40 km/h' -> source option A (40 km/h). Candidate scores are not strong but the prompt aligns closely.
Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Source says immediately rescue injured and notify police — matches q0247 (immediate rescue and report). Options are Yes/No so map to French A = Yes / Right.
Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Source: forgery/alteration of driving licence is criminal — matches q0265 (criminal liability). Yes = French A.
Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Source: when traffic slow and others merge, polite yielding + keep safe distance — matches q0135 (yield as much as possible). French C corresponds to that meaning.
Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Source: night visibility distance shortens — meaning matches q0161 (visibility shorter). French B = 'elle se raccourcit'.

items.sourcePrompt: Quand s'allume, il signifie que le levier de frein à main est en marche.

items.sourcePrompt: Sur la voie montante d'une route montagneuse, il faut réduire la vitesse à temps de manière appropriée et rapide, afin d'eviter qu'il puisse avoir des anomalies cousant l'insuffisance du moteur.

Closest candidate (q0043) requires timely downshift to lower gear — related but not identical (speed vs gear). Insufficient alignment to safely approve an existing qid.
